headline: Apotex launches sitagliptin tablets and sitagliptin and metformin hydrochloride tablets, eligible for 180-day shared exclusivity
summary: Apotex Corp. ("Apotex") today announced the U.S. launch of sitagliptin tablets and sitagliptin and metformin hydrochloride tablets, both of which are eligible for 180‑day shared exclusivity. These launches expand Apotex's portfolio of treatment options for adults living with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
